summary: The implementation successfully integrates Stripe payment processing with checkout session creation, success/failure callback pages, and configuration setup. However, the critical backend webhook handling for automatic order confirmation is missing, leaving REQ-3 unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend logic to handle Stripe payment webhooks and automatically confirm orders when payment is successful
missing_requirements.reason: No webhook endpoint or handler was added to the backend. The backend modifications show Stripe configuration storage but no webhook validation, order confirmation logic, or payment event processing

missing_requirements.requirement: Orders are automatically confirmed after successful Stripe payment
missing_requirements.reason: Without webhook handling in the backend, orders cannot be automatically confirmed. The PaymentSuccessPage only invalidates cart queries but does not trigger order confirmation

missing_requirements.requirement: Payment confirmation updates the order status in the backend
missing_requirements.reason: No order status update logic is present in the backend. There is no order management system or status tracking visible in the backend modifications

hallucinated_features.description: URL parameter utility functions for extracting query parameters from hash-based routing
hallucinated_features.reason: The urlParams.ts file implements extensive URL and session parameter management that was not requested in any requirement. This includes functions like getPersistedUrlParameter, storeSessionParameter, and clearParamFromHash

hallucinated_features.description: Shopping cart invalidation on payment success page
hallucinated_features.reason: PaymentSuccessPage clears cart data using queryClient.invalidateQueries, but this cart clearing functionality was not specified in the requirements. The requirements only mention order confirmation, not cart clearing behavior
